one_time_description: Contribution to Gosoomba Dehshe Trust (2017) reducing accumulated surplus
economic_notes: First Nation operates communities of Dettah and N'Dilo, NT. Deton'Cho Corporation is a large GBE with $55.2M revenue across numerous subsidiaries in construction, catering, logistics, aviation, mining supplies, environmental services, and security. COVID-19 impacted operations in March 2020 with office closures and program suspensions.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to multiple unaudited or review-only subsidiaries within Deton'Cho Corporation group including numerous joint ventures and subsidiaries. Fiscal year is 2020, not 2024. Province is NT (Northwest Territories). No long-term debt on First Nation's own balance sheet; GBEs carry significant debt ($15.5M long-term liabilities). First Nation was non-compliant with MACA policies regarding required reserve deposits for Gas Tax and CPI funds at March 31, 2020. Remuneration schedule not included in extracted text. Chief and Council wages expensed as related party transactions total $420,013. Two GBEs: Deton'Cho Corporation and Deton'Cho Management Limited Partnership with combined revenue of $55.2M. OSR calculated as total revenue $13,254,162 minus total government transfers $8,596,919 = $4,657,243.
